fields.label: Pattern Key
fields.description: Stable dedupe key: re-detection refreshes the existing row (and remembers Rejected suppressions) instead of proposing a duplicate.

fields.label: Domain
fields.options:
selling
buying
stock
accounts
projects
org

fields.label: Roles
fields.description: Roles detected for this pattern; seeds the compiled skill's allowed_roles on Apply (admin-editable on the board).

fields.label: Draft Edited
fields.description: Set on edit-then-approve; the evidence line is frozen (it reflects the originally detected pattern, not the edit).

fields.label: Draft Polished
fields.description: Set by the LLM polish endpoint: the polished skill_draft is not overwritten by mining/drift refresh (unlike draft_edited the evidence stays un-frozen). Cleared by the engine when the detected pattern statement materially changes, and on approve.

fields.label: Support (Units)
fields.description: Independent units (distinct parent documents, parties or months as declared per detector), never child-table rows.

fields.label: Raw Rows
fields.description: Raw row count; drill-down only, never used for gating.

fields.label: Evidence
fields.description: Aggregates + exception refs for the drill-down. Never embedded in compiled skill text.

fields.label: Exceptions Cluster
fields.description: Set when >60% of exceptions concentrate in one entity (sub-rule candidate).

fields.label: Sensitivity (Effective)
fields.description: max(declared class, content class): any text naming a specific party is at least B.

fields.label: Not Applicable
fields.description: The site's data can never satisfy this detector (e.g. printing bypasses Frappe's print system) - distinct from data-starved.

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Proposed
Approved
Active
Rejected
Snoozed
Stale
Superseded
Archived

fields.label: Materialized Skill
fields.description: The learned-<domain> consolidated skill row this pattern last compiled into.

fields.label: Counter Evidence
fields.description: Correction-loop flags from chat users: [{user, note, ts}], one entry per user (a re-flag updates that user's entry in place).

fields.label: Flags Count
fields.description: Total flag events (a re-flag by the same user still counts as an event). Flags from >=2 distinct users or >=3 events demote the strength band one level.

fields.label: Flag Band Cap
fields.description: Strength ceiling written by the correction loop: every pipeline write of strength_band clamps to the weaker of (computed band, this cap), so a flag-driven demotion survives the nightly refresh. Cleared on approve.

fields.label: Overlap Warning
fields.description: Lexical overlap with a customer-authored skill (warn-only).
